In the activity of providing transportation services to armada truk. Dalam kegiatan melayani angkutan dari these companies, the company does not enter into a special perusahaan-perusahaan tersebut, Perseroan tidak cooperation agreement, as the supply of trucks is based on mengadakan perjanjian kerja sama khusus, karena the request of these companies. For this reason, a satisfactory penyediaan truk didasarkan pada permintaan perusahaan- service is required so that the revenues can continue and perusahaan tersebut.
